testcase.name: setupSuite
testcase.error: java.lang.RuntimeException: Error reading test cases at utils.ColumnKeywordReader.readTestCases(ColumnKeywordReader.java:38) at keywords.TestRunner.setupSuite(TestRunner.java:36) at a NUMERIC cell at org.apache.poi.xssf.usermodel.XSSFCell.typeMismatch(XSSFCell.java:987) at org.apache.poi.xssf.usermodel.XSSFCell.getRichStringCellValue(XSSFCell.java:336) at
